--- Generate LLVM IR files(.ll) for host and device
--- Translate the kernel bitcode by using CuPBoP's kernel translator
init_block
; ModuleID = 'gaussian-cuda-nvptx64-nvidia-cuda-sm_50.bc'
source_filename = "./gaussian.cu"
target datalayout = "e-i64:64-i128:128-v16:16-v32:32-n16:32:64"
target triple = "nvptx64-nvidia-cuda"

%struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t = type { i8 }
%struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t = type { i8 }
%printf_args = type { i32, i32, i32, i32, i32, i32 }

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_xEv = comdat any

$_ZN26__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

$_ZN25__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t17__fetch_builtin_yEv = comdat any

@threadIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_threadIdx_t, align 1
@blockIdx = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockIdx_t, align 1
@blockDim = extern_weak dso_local addrspace(1) global %struct.__cuda_builtin_blockDim_t, align 1
@.str = private unnamed_addr constant [98 x i8] c"blockIdx.x: %d, threadIdx.x: %d, blockIdx.y: %d, threadIdx.y: %d, blockDim.x: %d, blockDim.y: %d\0A\00", align 1, !dbg !0

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline nounwind optnone
define weak dso_local i32 @cudaMalloc(ptr noundef %p, i64 noundef %s) #0 !dbg !1191 {
entry:
  %p.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %s.addr = alloca i64, align 8
  store ptr %p, ptr %p.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %p.addr, metadata !1198, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1199
  store i64 %s, ptr %s.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %s.addr, metadata !1200, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1201
  ret i32 999, !dbg !1202
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata, metadata, metadata) #1

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline nounwind optnone
define weak dso_local i32 @cudaFuncGetAttributes(ptr noundef %p, ptr noundef %c) #0 !dbg !1203 {
entry:
  %p.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %c.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  store ptr %p, ptr %p.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %p.addr, metadata !1219, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1220
  store ptr %c, ptr %c.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %c.addr, metadata !1221, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1222
  ret i32 999, !dbg !1223
}

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline nounwind optnone
define weak dso_local i32 @cudaDeviceGetAttribute(ptr noundef %value, i32 noundef %attr, i32 noundef %device) #0 !dbg !1224 {
entry:
  %value.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %attr.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %device.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  store ptr %value, ptr %value.addr, align 8

  %sub = sub nsw i32 %3, 1, !dbg !1216
  %4 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1217

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #1 {
entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4

  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1197, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1198
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1199, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1200
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4

  %1 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1207
  %2 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1210
  %mul = mul i32 %1, %2, !dbg !1213
  %add = add i32 %0, %mul, !dbg !1214
  %3 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1215
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %3, 1, !dbg !1216
  %4 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1217
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %4, !dbg !1218
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1219
  br i1 %cmp, label %if.then, label %if.end, !dbg !1220

if.then:                                          ; preds = %entry
  br label %return, !dbg !1221

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry
  %5 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1222
  %6 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1223
  %7 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1224
  %8 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1226
  %mul6 = mul i32 %7, %8, !dbg !1228
  %9 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1229
  %add8 = add i32 %mul6, %9, !dbg !1231
  %10 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1232
  %add9 = add i32 %add8, %10, !dbg !1233
  %add10 = add i32 %add9, 1, !dbg !1234
  %mul11 = mul i32 %6, %add10, !dbg !1235
  %idx.ext = zext i32 %mul11 to i64, !dbg !1236
  %add.ptr = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %5, i64 %idx.ext, !dbg !1236
  %11 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1237
  %idx.ext12 = sext i32 %11 to i64, !dbg !1238
  %add.ptr13 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %add.ptr, i64 %idx.ext12, !dbg !1238
  %12 = load float, ptr %add.ptr13, align 4, !dbg !1239
  %13 = load ptr, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1240
  %14 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1241
  %15 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1242
  %mul14 = mul nsw i32 %14, %15, !dbg !1243
  %idx.ext15 = sext i32 %mul14 to i64, !dbg !1244
  %add.ptr16 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %13, i64 %idx.ext15, !dbg !1244
  %16 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1245
  %idx.ext17 = sext i32 %16 to i64, !dbg !1246
  %add.ptr18 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %add.ptr16, i64 %idx.ext17, !dbg !1246
  %17 = load float, ptr %add.ptr18, align 4, !dbg !1247
  %div = fdiv contract float %12, %17, !dbg !1248
  %18 = load ptr, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1249
  %19 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1250
  %20 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1251
  %21 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1253

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noundef %m_cuda, ptr noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) #1 {
entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1191, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1196
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1197, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1198
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1199, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1200
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1201, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1202
  %0 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1203
  %1 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1207
  %2 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1210
  %mul = mul i32 %1, %2, !dbg !1213
  %add = add i32 %0, %mul, !dbg !1214
  %3 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1215
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %3, 1, !dbg !1216
  %4 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1217
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %4, !dbg !1218

entry:
  %m_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %a_cuda.addr = alloca ptr, align 8
  %Size.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  %t.addr = alloca i32, align 4
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  store ptr %m_cuda, ptr %m_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %m_cuda.addr, metadata !1191, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1196
  store ptr %a_cuda, ptr %a_cuda.addr, align 8
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %a_cuda.addr, metadata !1197, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1198
  store i32 %Size, ptr %Size.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %Size.addr, metadata !1199, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1200
  store i32 %t, ptr %t.addr, align 4
  call void @llvm.dbg.declare(metadata ptr %t.addr, metadata !1201, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1202
  %0 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.tid.x(), !dbg !1203
  %1 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ctaid.x(), !dbg !1207
  %2 = call noundef i32 @llvm.nvvm.read.ptx.sreg.ntid.x(), !dbg !1210
  %mul = mul i32 %1, %2, !dbg !1213
  %add = add i32 %0, %mul, !dbg !1214
  %3 = load i32, ptr %Size.addr, align 4, !dbg !1215
  %sub = sub nsw i32 %3, 1, !dbg !1216
  %4 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1217
  %sub3 = sub nsw i32 %sub, %4, !dbg !1218
  %cmp = icmp uge i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1219

  %56 = load ptr, ptr %b_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1402
  %57 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1403
  %idxprom56 = sext i32 %57 to i64, !dbg !1402
  %arrayidx57 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %56, i64 %idxprom56, !dbg !1402
  %58 = load float, ptr %arrayidx57, align 4, !dbg !1402
  %mul58 = fmul contract float %55, %58, !dbg !1404
  %59 = load ptr, ptr %b_cuda.addr, align 8, !dbg !1405
  %60 = load i32, ptr %xidx, align 4, !dbg !1406
  %add59 = add nsw i32 %60, 1, !dbg !1407
  %61 = load i32, ptr %t.addr, align 4, !dbg !1408
  %add60 = add nsw i32 %add59, %61, !dbg !1409
  %idxprom61 = sext i32 %add60 to i64, !dbg !1405
  %arrayidx62 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %59, i64 %idxprom61, !dbg !1405
  %62 = load float, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1410
  %sub63 = fsub contract float %62, %mul58, !dbg !1410
  store float %sub63, ptr %arrayidx62, align 4, !dbg !1410
  br label %if.end64, !dbg !1411

if.end64:                                         ; preds = %if.then, %if.then11, %if.then48, %if.end12
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_0

if.end64_after_block_sync_0:                      ; preds = %if.end64
  call void @llvm.nvvm.barrier0()
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_2, !dbg !1412

if.end64_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_2:   ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_0
  ret void, !dbg !1412
}

if.end64_after_block_sync_0:                      ; preds = %reset_block
  br label %if.end64_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_2, !dbg !1421

if.end64_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_2:   ; preds = %if.end64_after_block_sync_0
  ret void, !dbg !1421
}

@.str = private unnamed_addr constant [98 x i8] c"blockIdx.x: %d, threadIdx.x: %d, blockIdx.y: %d, threadIdx.y: %d, blockDim.x: %d, blockDim.y: %d\0A\00", align 1, !dbg !0

; Function Attrs: convergent mustprogress noinline norecurse nounwind optnone
define dso_local void @_Z4Fan1PfS_ii(ptr noalias noundef %m_cuda, ptr noalias noundef %a_cuda, i32 noundef %Size, i32 noundef %t) local_unnamed_addr #1 {
entry:
  %0 = load i32, ptr @block_size, align 4
  %.not = icmp eq i32 %0, 0
  br i1 %.not, label %reset_block, label %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4.lr.ph, !llvm.loop !1191

entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4.lr.ph: ; preds = %entry
  %1 = load i32, ptr @block_size_x, align 4
  %2 = tail call ptr @llvm.threadlocal.address.p0(ptr @block_index_x)
  %3 = load i32, ptr %2, align 4
  %mul = mul i32 %3, %1
  %4 = xor i32 %t, -1
  %sub3 = add i32 %4, %Size
  %add9 = add i32 %t, 1
  %idx.ext12 = sext i32 %t to i64
  %invariant.gep = getelementptr float, ptr %a_cuda, i64 %idx.ext12
  %mul14 = mul nsw i32 %t, %Size
  %idx.ext15 = sext i32 %mul14 to i64
  %add.ptr16 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %a_cuda, i64 %idx.ext15
  %add.ptr18 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %add.ptr16, i64 %idx.ext12
  %invariant.gep22 = getelementptr float, ptr %m_cuda, i64 %idx.ext12
  br label %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4

entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4:      ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4.lr.ph, %return
  %local_intra_warp_idx.021 = phi i32 [ 0, %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4.lr.ph ], [ %intra_warp_index_increment, %return ]
  tail call void @llvm.dbg.value(metadata ptr %m_cuda, metadata !1194, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1199
  tail call void @llvm.dbg.value(metadata ptr %a_cuda, metadata !1200, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1199
  tail call void @llvm.dbg.value(metadata i32 %Size, metadata !1201, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1199
  tail call void @llvm.dbg.value(metadata i32 %t, metadata !1202, metadata !DIExpression()), !dbg !1199
  %thread_id_x = srem i32 %local_intra_warp_idx.021, %1, !dbg !1203
  %add = add i32 %mul, %thread_id_x, !dbg !1207
  %cmp.not = icmp ult i32 %add, %sub3, !dbg !1208
  br i1 %cmp.not, label %if.end, label %return, !dbg !1209

if.end:                                           ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4
  %add10 = add i32 %add9, %add, !dbg !1210
  %mul11 = mul i32 %add10, %Size, !dbg !1211
  %idx.ext = zext i32 %mul11 to i64, !dbg !1212
  %gep = getelementptr float, ptr %invariant.gep, i64 %idx.ext, !dbg !1213
  %5 = load float, ptr %gep, align 4, !dbg !1214, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1215
  %6 = load float, ptr %add.ptr18, align 4, !dbg !1216, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1215
  %div = fdiv contract float %5, %6, !dbg !1217
  %gep23 = getelementptr float, ptr %invariant.gep22, i64 %idx.ext, !dbg !1218
  store float %div, ptr %gep23, align 4, !dbg !1219, !llvm.mem.parallel_loop_access !1215
  br label %return, !dbg !1220

return:                                           ; preds = %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4, %if.end
  %intra_warp_index_increment = add nuw i32 %local_intra_warp_idx.021, 1
  %exitcond.not = icmp eq i32 %intra_warp_index_increment, %0
  br i1 %exitcond.not, label %reset_block, label %entry_after_block_sync_0_after_block_sync_4, !llvm.loop !1191

reset_block:                                      ; preds = %return, %entry
  ret void, !dbg !1220
}
